entry.data:
PARTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS, MAINLY THIS EVENING
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
SOUTH WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH
GUSTS UP TO 35 MPH THIS EVENING
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE MORNING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
A SLIGHT CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE MORNING, THEN A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 25 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS AROUND 60
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 25 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

SHOWERS WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE MORNING, THEN SHOWERS LIKELY IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
TEMPERATURE FALLING INTO THE LOWER 60S IN THE AFTERNOON
WEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN NEAR 100 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN CLEARING
MUCH COOLER WITH LOWS AROUND 40
NORTHWEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH

CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 30S
HIGHS IN THE MID 60S

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 30S
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 50S

MOSTLY CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 30S

PARTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
LOWS AROUND 50
